---
title: "CB3 Equity Report — Language Maps"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    code-fold: true
execute:
  echo: true
  warning: false
  message: false
jupyter: python3
---

## Purpose

Render Language-domain maps with the same user-facing pattern as the Health-domain maps:

- right-side radio buttons for demographic tract-color background layers;
- right-side checkboxes for Language metric bubble overlays;
- exact Language metric values on bubble hover.

This file uses `map_utils.py` for the shared base map and title, but creates a custom always-visible layer panel because the default Folium layer control was not showing reliably in this branch.

```{python}
from pathlib import Path
import html
import json
import sys

import branca.colormap as cm
import folium
import geopandas as gpd
import numpy as np
import pandas as pd

for candidate in [Path.cwd(), *Path.cwd().parents]:
    if (candidate / "src" / "map_utils.py").exists():
        sys.path.insert(0, str(candidate))
        break

from src.cb3_utils import load_cb3_tract_universe
from src.map_utils import find_project_dir, make_base_map, add_map_title
```

```{python}
PROJECT_DIR = find_project_dir()
CLEAN_DIR = PROJECT_DIR / "data" / "clean"
MAP_OUTPUT_DIR = PROJECT_DIR / "maps" / "language"
MAP_OUTPUT_DIR.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

LANGUAGE_PATH = CLEAN_DIR / "language.csv"

BASELINE_CANDIDATES = [
    CLEAN_DIR / "tract_baseline_profile_clean.csv",
    CLEAN_DIR / "tract_baseline_profile_partial_before_crosswalk.csv",
    CLEAN_DIR / "tract_baseline_profile_partial_before_crosswalk_clean.csv",
    CLEAN_DIR / "cb3_tract_baseline_profile.csv",
    CLEAN_DIR / "cb3_tract_baseline_profile_clean.csv",
    CLEAN_DIR / "baseline" / "tract_baseline_profile_clean.csv",
    CLEAN_DIR / "baseline" / "tract_baseline_profile_partial_before_crosswalk.csv",
]
```

## Load data

```{python}
LANGUAGE_METADATA = {
    "asian_pacific_limited_english_household_share": {
        "short_label": "Asian/Pacific Island language LEP households",
        "label": "Share of households that speak Asian or Pacific Island languages and have limited English-speaking status",
        "filename": "asian_pacific_limited_english_household_share.html",
        "count_col": "asian_pacific_limited_english_households",
        "denominator_col": "households_language_universe",
        "count_label": "Asian/Pacific Island language LEP households",
        "denominator_label": "Household universe",
        "unit": "%",
    },
    "spanish_limited_english_household_share": {
        "short_label": "Spanish-speaking LEP households",
        "label": "Share of households that speak Spanish and have limited English-speaking status",
        "filename": "spanish_limited_english_household_share.html",
        "count_col": "spanish_limited_english_households",
        "denominator_col": "households_language_universe",
        "count_label": "Spanish-speaking LEP households",
        "denominator_label": "Household universe",
        "unit": "%",
    },
    "lep_household_share": {
        "short_label": "Limited-English-proficient households",
        "label": "Share of households with limited English-speaking status",
        "filename": "aggregate_limited_english_household_share.html",
        "count_col": "lep_households",
        "denominator_col": "households_language_universe",
        "count_label": "LEP households",
        "denominator_label": "Household universe",
        "unit": "%",
    },
    "other_indo_european_limited_english_household_share": {
        "short_label": "Other Indo-European language LEP households",
        "label": "Share of households that speak other Indo-European languages and have limited English-speaking status",
        "filename": "other_indo_european_limited_english_household_share.html",
        "count_col": "other_indo_european_limited_english_households",
        "denominator_col": "households_language_universe",
        "count_label": "Other Indo-European language LEP households",
        "denominator_label": "Household universe",
        "unit": "%",
    },
    "other_languages_limited_english_household_share": {
        "short_label": "Other language LEP households",
        "label": "Share of households that speak other languages and have limited English-speaking status",
        "filename": "other_languages_limited_english_household_share.html",
        "count_col": "other_languages_limited_english_households",
        "denominator_col": "households_language_universe",
        "count_label": "Other-language LEP households",
        "denominator_label": "Household universe",
        "unit": "%",
    },
}

DEMOGRAPHIC_METADATA = {
    "median_household_income": {"short_label": "Median household income", "label": "Median household income", "unit": "$"},
    "age_0_to_19_share": {"short_label": "Age 0-19", "label": "Share of residents age 0 to 19", "unit": "%"},
    "age_20_to_64_share": {"short_label": "Age 20-64", "label": "Share of residents age 20 to 64", "unit": "%"},
    "age_65_plus_share": {"short_label": "Age 65+", "label": "Share of residents age 65 or older", "unit": "%"},
    "white_non_hispanic_share": {"short_label": "White non-Hispanic share", "label": "Share of residents who are White non-Hispanic", "unit": "%"},
    "black_non_hispanic_share": {"short_label": "Black non-Hispanic share", "label": "Share of residents who are Black non-Hispanic", "unit": "%"},
    "asian_non_hispanic_share": {"short_label": "Asian non-Hispanic share", "label": "Share of residents who are Asian non-Hispanic", "unit": "%"},
    "hispanic_share": {"short_label": "Hispanic share", "label": "Share of residents who are Hispanic or Latino", "unit": "%"},
    "poverty_rate": {"short_label": "Poverty rate", "label": "Share of residents below poverty", "unit": "%"},
    "lep_household_share": {"short_label": "Limited-English-proficient households", "label": "Share of households with limited English-speaking status", "unit": "%"},
}

LANGUAGE_METRICS = list(LANGUAGE_METADATA.keys())

DEMOGRAPHIC_LAYER_CANDIDATES = [
    "median_household_income",
    "age_0_to_19_share",
    "age_20_to_64_share",
    "age_65_plus_share",
    "white_non_hispanic_share",
    "black_non_hispanic_share",
    "asian_non_hispanic_share",
    "hispanic_share",
    "poverty_rate",
    "lep_household_share",
]
```

```{python}
def normalize_geoid(series):
    return series.astype(str).str.replace(r"\.0$", "", regex=True).str.zfill(11)


def add_geoid(df):
    if "GEOID" in df.columns:
        df["GEOID"] = normalize_geoid(df["GEOID"])
        return df
    if "geoid" in df.columns:
        df = df.rename(columns={"geoid": "GEOID"})
        df["GEOID"] = normalize_geoid(df["GEOID"])
        return df
    if "GEOID20" in df.columns:
        df = df.rename(columns={"GEOID20": "GEOID"})
        df["GEOID"] = normalize_geoid(df["GEOID"])
        return df
    if {"state", "county", "tract"}.issubset(df.columns):
        df["GEOID"] = (
            df["state"].astype(str).str.replace(r"\.0$", "", regex=True).str.zfill(2)
            + df["county"].astype(str).str.replace(r"\.0$", "", regex=True).str.zfill(3)
            + df["tract"].astype(str).str.replace(r"\.0$", "", regex=True).str.zfill(6)
        )
        return df
    raise KeyError(f"Could not create GEOID from columns: {list(df.columns)}")


def load_demographic_baseline():
    for path in BASELINE_CANDIDATES:
        if not path.exists():
            continue

        df = pd.read_csv(path, dtype={"GEOID": "string", "geoid": "string", "GEOID20": "string"})
        df = add_geoid(df)
        available = [col for col in DEMOGRAPHIC_LAYER_CANDIDATES if col in df.columns]

        if available:
            print(f"Using demographic baseline: {path}")
            print(f"Demographic columns found: {available}")
            out = df[["GEOID"] + available].copy()
            for col in available:
                out[col] = pd.to_numeric(out[col], errors="coerce")
            return out

        print(f"Found baseline candidate but no expected demographic columns: {path}")

    print("No usable demographic baseline found. Checked:")
    for path in BASELINE_CANDIDATES:
        print(f"  {path}")
    return pd.DataFrame(columns=["GEOID"])
```

```{python}
language = pd.read_csv(LANGUAGE_PATH, dtype={"GEOID": "string"})
language = add_geoid(language)

baseline = load_demographic_baseline()

tract_universe, cb3_geometry, _, _ = load_cb3_tract_universe(PROJECT_DIR)
tract_universe["GEOID"] = normalize_geoid(tract_universe["GEOID"])
cb3_geometry["GEOID"] = normalize_geoid(cb3_geometry["GEOID"])

tracts = cb3_geometry.merge(
    tract_universe.drop(columns="geometry", errors="ignore"),
    on="GEOID",
    how="left",
    validate="one_to_one",
)

tracts = tracts.merge(
    language[[col for col in language.columns if col == "GEOID" or col not in tracts.columns]],
    on="GEOID",
    how="left",
    validate="one_to_one",
)

if not baseline.empty:
    tracts = tracts.merge(
        baseline[[col for col in baseline.columns if col == "GEOID" or col not in tracts.columns]],
        on="GEOID",
        how="left",
        validate="one_to_one",
    )

tracts = tracts.to_crs("EPSG:4326")

for col in tracts.columns:
    if col != "geometry" and col not in ["GEOID", "NAME", "nta_name", "nta_code", "cdta_name", "cdta_code", "tract_name"]:
        tracts[col] = pd.to_numeric(tracts[col], errors="ignore")

for metric in LANGUAGE_METRICS:
    if metric not in tracts.columns:
        raise KeyError(f"Missing required Language metric column: {metric}")
    tracts[metric] = pd.to_numeric(tracts[metric], errors="coerce")

DEMOGRAPHIC_LAYERS = [
    metric for metric in DEMOGRAPHIC_LAYER_CANDIDATES
    if metric in tracts.columns and pd.to_numeric(tracts[metric], errors="coerce").notna().any()
]

for metric in DEMOGRAPHIC_LAYERS:
    tracts[metric] = pd.to_numeric(tracts[metric], errors="coerce")

assert len(tracts) == 31
assert tracts["GEOID"].is_unique

print(f"Rows: {len(tracts)}")
print("Language bubble overlays:")
for metric in LANGUAGE_METRICS:
    print(f"  {metric}: {tracts[metric].notna().sum()} non-null")

print("Demographic side-panel options:")
if DEMOGRAPHIC_LAYERS:
    for metric in DEMOGRAPHIC_LAYERS:
        print(f"  {metric}: {tracts[metric].notna().sum()} non-null")
else:
    print("  none")
```

## Map helpers

```{python}
BACKGROUND_PALETTE = ["#fff7fb", "#ece2f0", "#d0d1e6", "#a6bddb", "#67a9cf", "#1c9099", "#016c59"]
BUBBLE_COLOR = "#111111"
BUBBLE_FILL = "#111111"


def _meta(metric):
    return LANGUAGE_METADATA.get(metric) or DEMOGRAPHIC_METADATA.get(metric) or {}


def _metric_label(metric):
    return _meta(metric).get("label", metric)


def _metric_short_label(metric):
    return _meta(metric).get("short_label", metric)


def _metric_unit(metric):
    return _meta(metric).get("unit", "%")


def _format_value(value, unit="%"):
    if pd.isna(value):
        return "Not available"
    if unit == "%":
        return f"{value:.1f}%"
    if unit == "$":
        return f"${value:,.0f}"
    if unit == "count":
        return f"{value:,.0f}"
    return f"{value:.1f} {unit}".strip()


def _classification_breaks(values, bins=5):
    valid = pd.Series(values).dropna()
    valid = valid[valid >= 0]
    if valid.empty:
        return [0, 1]
    if valid.nunique() <= bins:
        breaks = sorted(valid.unique())
    else:
        breaks = list(valid.quantile(np.linspace(0, 1, bins + 1)).values)
    breaks = sorted(set(float(x) for x in breaks if pd.notna(x)))
    if len(breaks) == 1:
        breaks = [0.0, breaks[0]] if breaks[0] > 0 else [0.0, 1.0]
    cleaned = [breaks[0]]
    for value in breaks[1:]:
        if value <= cleaned[-1]:
            value = cleaned[-1] + 1e-9
        cleaned.append(value)
    return cleaned


def _prep_display_columns(geodata, metric):
    plot_data = geodata.copy()
    unit = _metric_unit(metric)
    count_col = _meta(metric).get("count_col")
    denominator_col = _meta(metric).get("denominator_col")

    plot_data[metric] = pd.to_numeric(plot_data[metric], errors="coerce")
    plot_data[f"{metric}_display"] = plot_data[metric].apply(lambda v: _format_value(v, unit))

    if count_col and count_col in plot_data.columns:
        plot_data[count_col] = pd.to_numeric(plot_data[count_col], errors="coerce")
        plot_data[f"{count_col}_display"] = plot_data[count_col].apply(lambda v: _format_value(v, "count"))

    if denominator_col and denominator_col in plot_data.columns:
        plot_data[denominator_col] = pd.to_numeric(plot_data[denominator_col], errors="coerce")
        plot_data[f"{denominator_col}_display"] = plot_data[denominator_col].apply(lambda v: _format_value(v, "count"))

    return plot_data
```

```{python}
def add_demographic_layer(map_object, geodata, metric):
    label = _metric_short_label(metric)
    plot_data = geodata.copy()
    plot_data[metric] = pd.to_numeric(plot_data[metric], errors="coerce")

    breaks = _classification_breaks(plot_data[metric], bins=5)
    colors = BACKGROUND_PALETTE[: max(2, len(breaks) - 1)]
    if len(colors) < len(breaks) - 1:
        colors = BACKGROUND_PALETTE

    color_map = cm.StepColormap(colors=colors, index=breaks, vmin=breaks[0], vmax=breaks[-1])

    def style_function(feature):
        value = feature["properties"].get(metric)
        fill_color = "#f7f7f7" if value is None or pd.isna(value) else color_map(value)
        return {
            "fillColor": fill_color,
            "color": "#4d4d4d",
            "weight": 1.1,
            "fillOpacity": 0.72,
        }

    group = folium.FeatureGroup(name=label, show=False, control=False)
    folium.GeoJson(plot_data, interactive=False, style_function=style_function).add_to(group)
    group.add_to(map_object)
    return {"label": label, "js_name": group.get_name(), "metric": metric}


def add_no_background_layer(map_object, geodata):
    group = folium.FeatureGroup(name="No demographic background", show=False, control=False)
    folium.GeoJson(
        geodata,
        interactive=False,
        style_function=lambda feature: {
            "fillColor": "#ffffff",
            "color": "#4d4d4d",
            "weight": 1.0,
            "fillOpacity": 0.0,
        },
    ).add_to(group)
    group.add_to(map_object)
    return {"label": "No demographic background", "js_name": group.get_name(), "metric": "__none__"}


def add_tract_outline_layer(map_object, geodata):
    group = folium.FeatureGroup(name="CB3 census tract outlines", show=True, control=False)
    folium.GeoJson(
        geodata,
        interactive=False,
        style_function=lambda feature: {
            "fillColor": "transparent",
            "color": "#333333",
            "weight": 1.4,
            "fillOpacity": 0,
        },
    ).add_to(group)
    group.add_to(map_object)
    return {"label": "CB3 census tract outlines", "js_name": group.get_name()}


def add_language_bubble_layer(map_object, geodata, metric, show=True):
    meta = _meta(metric)
    label = _metric_short_label(metric)
    count_col = meta.get("count_col")
    denominator_col = meta.get("denominator_col")
    count_label = meta.get("count_label", "Count")
    denominator_label = meta.get("denominator_label", "Denominator")

    plot_data = _prep_display_columns(geodata, metric)

    if count_col and count_col in plot_data.columns:
        size_values = pd.to_numeric(plot_data[count_col], errors="coerce").fillna(0)
    else:
        size_values = pd.to_numeric(plot_data[metric], errors="coerce").fillna(0)

    max_size_value = max(float(size_values.max(skipna=True)), 1.0)

    projected = plot_data.to_crs("EPSG:2263")
    points = projected.copy()
    points["geometry"] = points.geometry.representative_point()
    points = points.to_crs("EPSG:4326")

    group = folium.FeatureGroup(name=f"{label} bubbles", show=show, control=False)

    for _, row in points.iterrows():
        share_value = row.get(metric)
        if pd.isna(share_value):
            continue

        count_value = row.get(count_col) if count_col in points.columns else np.nan
        size_source = count_value if pd.notna(count_value) else share_value
        radius = 4 + 13 * np.sqrt(max(float(size_source), 0) / max_size_value)

        tooltip_lines = [
            f"<b>Tract:</b> {row.get('tract_label', row.get('GEOID', ''))}",
            f"<b>NTA:</b> {row.get('nta_name', '')}",
            f"<b>{label}:</b> {row.get(f'{metric}_display', _format_value(share_value, '%'))}",
        ]
        if count_col and f"{count_col}_display" in row:
            tooltip_lines.append(f"<b>{count_label}:</b> {row.get(f'{count_col}_display')}")
        if denominator_col and f"{denominator_col}_display" in row:
            tooltip_lines.append(f"<b>{denominator_label}:</b> {row.get(f'{denominator_col}_display')}")

        tooltip_html = "<br>".join(tooltip_lines)

        folium.CircleMarker(
            location=[row.geometry.y, row.geometry.x],
            radius=radius,
            color=BUBBLE_COLOR,
            weight=1.4,
            fill=True,
            fill_color=BUBBLE_FILL,
            fill_opacity=0.38,
            opacity=0.72,
            tooltip=folium.Tooltip(tooltip_html, sticky=True),
            popup=folium.Popup(tooltip_html, max_width=320),
        ).add_to(group)

    group.add_to(map_object)
    return {"label": f"{label} bubbles", "js_name": group.get_name(), "metric": metric, "show": show}
```

```{python}
def add_custom_side_panel(map_object, demographic_layers, bubble_layers, outline_layer, default_demographic_index=0):
    map_name = map_object.get_name()

    demo_html = []
    for i, layer in enumerate(demographic_layers):
        checked = "checked" if i == default_demographic_index else ""
        demo_html.append(
            f"""
            <label class="cb3-layer-option">
              <input type="radio" name="cb3-demographic-bg" value="{i}" {checked}>
              {html.escape(layer["label"])}
            </label>
            """
        )

    bubble_html = []
    for i, layer in enumerate(bubble_layers):
        checked = "checked" if layer.get("show") else ""
        bubble_html.append(
            f"""
            <label class="cb3-layer-option">
              <input type="checkbox" class="cb3-bubble-toggle" value="{i}" {checked}>
              {html.escape(layer["label"])}
            </label>
            """
        )

    panel_html = f"""
    <div id="cb3-custom-layer-panel" class="cb3-layer-panel">
      <div class="cb3-layer-section">
        {''.join(demo_html)}
      </div>
      <hr>
      <div class="cb3-layer-section">
        <label class="cb3-layer-option">
          <input type="checkbox" id="cb3-outline-toggle" checked>
          {html.escape(outline_layer["label"])}
        </label>
        {''.join(bubble_html)}
      </div>
    </div>
    """

    css = """
    <style>
      #cb3-custom-layer-panel {
        position: fixed !important;
        top: 12px !important;
        right: 12px !important;
        z-index: 2147483647 !important;
        background: rgba(255,255,255,0.97) !important;
        border: 2px solid #888 !important;
        border-radius: 6px !important;
        padding: 10px 12px !important;
        min-width: 330px !important;
        max-width: 390px !important;
        max-height: 80vh !important;
        overflow-y: auto !important;
        font-family: Arial, sans-serif !important;
        font-size: 15px !important;
        line-height: 1.35 !important;
        box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.25) !important;
      }
      #cb3-custom-layer-panel .cb3-layer-option {
        display: block !important;
        margin: 5px 0 !important;
        color: #222 !important;
        white-space: normal !important;
      }
      #cb3-custom-layer-panel input {
        margin-right: 7px !important;
        transform: scale(1.15);
      }
      #cb3-custom-layer-panel hr {
        border: none !important;
        border-top: 1px solid #ccc !important;
        margin: 8px 0 !important;
      }
      .leaflet-tooltip {
        z-index: 2147483647 !important;
      }
    </style>
    """

    demo_js_entries = ",\n".join(
        [f'{{label: {json.dumps(layer["label"])}, layer: {layer["js_name"]}}}' for layer in demographic_layers]
    )
    bubble_js_entries = ",\n".join(
        [f'{{label: {json.dumps(layer["label"])}, layer: {layer["js_name"]}}}' for layer in bubble_layers]
    )

    js = f"""
    <script>
    (function() {{
      function setupCB3Panel() {{
        var map = {map_name};
        var demoLayers = [{demo_js_entries}];
        var bubbleLayers = [{bubble_js_entries}];
        var outlineLayer = {outline_layer["js_name"]};

        function setDemoLayer(index) {{
          demoLayers.forEach(function(item) {{
            if (map.hasLayer(item.layer)) {{
              map.removeLayer(item.layer);
            }}
          }});
          if (demoLayers[index]) {{
            demoLayers[index].layer.addTo(map);
          }}
        }}

        function setBubbleLayer(index, visible) {{
          if (!bubbleLayers[index]) return;
          var layer = bubbleLayers[index].layer;
          if (visible) {{
            if (!map.hasLayer(layer)) layer.addTo(map);
          }} else {{
            if (map.hasLayer(layer)) map.removeLayer(layer);
          }}
        }}

        var demoInputs = document.querySelectorAll('input[name="cb3-demographic-bg"]');
        demoInputs.forEach(function(input) {{
          input.addEventListener('change', function(e) {{
            setDemoLayer(parseInt(e.target.value));
          }});
        }});

        var bubbleInputs = document.querySelectorAll('.cb3-bubble-toggle');
        bubbleInputs.forEach(function(input) {{
          input.addEventListener('change', function(e) {{
            setBubbleLayer(parseInt(e.target.value), e.target.checked);
          }});
        }});

        var outlineInput = document.getElementById('cb3-outline-toggle');
        if (outlineInput) {{
          outlineInput.addEventListener('change', function(e) {{
            if (e.target.checked) {{
              if (!map.hasLayer(outlineLayer)) outlineLayer.addTo(map);
            }} else {{
              if (map.hasLayer(outlineLayer)) map.removeLayer(outlineLayer);
            }}
          }});
        }}

        var checkedDemo = document.querySelector('input[name="cb3-demographic-bg"]:checked');
        if (checkedDemo) {{
          setDemoLayer(parseInt(checkedDemo.value));
        }}
      }}

      if (document.readyState === 'loading') {{
        document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', setupCB3Panel);
      }} else {{
        setupCB3Panel();
      }}
    }})();
    </script>
    """

    map_object.get_root().html.add_child(folium.Element(css + panel_html + js))
    return map_object
```

```{python}
def save_language_map(metric, title, subtitle, output_filename=None):
    filename = output_filename or LANGUAGE_METADATA[metric].get("filename", f"{metric}.html")
    output_path = MAP_OUTPUT_DIR / filename

    map_object = make_base_map(tracts)

    demographic_layers = []
    for metric_name in DEMOGRAPHIC_LAYER_CANDIDATES:
        if metric_name in DEMOGRAPHIC_LAYERS:
            demographic_layers.append(add_demographic_layer(map_object, tracts, metric_name))
    demographic_layers.append(add_no_background_layer(map_object, tracts))

    outline_layer = add_tract_outline_layer(map_object, tracts)
    bubble_layers = [add_language_bubble_layer(map_object, tracts, metric, show=True)]

    default_idx = 0
    for i, layer in enumerate(demographic_layers):
        if layer["metric"] == "white_non_hispanic_share":
            default_idx = i

    add_map_title(map_object, title, subtitle)
    add_custom_side_panel(map_object, demographic_layers, bubble_layers, outline_layer, default_demographic_index=default_idx)

    map_object.save(output_path)
    print(f"Saved {output_path}")
    return map_object


def save_combined_language_layer_map():
    output_path = MAP_OUTPUT_DIR / "language_household_lep_layers.html"

    map_object = make_base_map(tracts)

    demographic_layers = []
    for metric_name in DEMOGRAPHIC_LAYER_CANDIDATES:
        if metric_name in DEMOGRAPHIC_LAYERS:
            demographic_layers.append(add_demographic_layer(map_object, tracts, metric_name))
    demographic_layers.append(add_no_background_layer(map_object, tracts))

    outline_layer = add_tract_outline_layer(map_object, tracts)

    bubble_layers = []
    for i, metric_name in enumerate(LANGUAGE_METRICS):
        bubble_layers.append(add_language_bubble_layer(map_object, tracts, metric_name, show=(i == 0)))

    default_idx = 0
    for i, layer in enumerate(demographic_layers):
        if layer["metric"] == "white_non_hispanic_share":
            default_idx = i

    add_map_title(
        map_object,
        "CB3 Language: household limited-English patterns",
        "Bubbles show language-access metrics; tract colors show selectable demographic context. Hover over bubbles for exact values.",
    )
    add_custom_side_panel(map_object, demographic_layers, bubble_layers, outline_layer, default_demographic_index=default_idx)

    map_object.save(output_path)
    print(f"Saved {output_path}")
    return map_object
```

## Primary maps

```{python}
asian_pacific_map = save_language_map(
    "asian_pacific_limited_english_household_share",
    "CB3 Language: Asian/Pacific Island language LEP households",
    "Bubbles show Asian/Pacific Island language LEP households; tract colors show selectable demographic context.",
)
asian_pacific_map
```

```{python}
spanish_map = save_language_map(
    "spanish_limited_english_household_share",
    "CB3 Language: Spanish-speaking LEP households",
    "Bubbles show Spanish-speaking LEP households; tract colors show selectable demographic context.",
)
spanish_map
```

## Supplementary maps

```{python}
supplementary_maps = {}
for metric in [
    "lep_household_share",
    "other_indo_european_limited_english_household_share",
    "other_languages_limited_english_household_share",
]:
    supplementary_maps[metric] = save_language_map(
        metric,
        f"CB3 Language: {_metric_short_label(metric)}",
        "Bubbles show language-access values; tract colors show selectable demographic context.",
    )
```

## Combined interactive layer map

```{python}
combined_language_map = save_combined_language_layer_map()
combined_language_map
```

## Validation summary

```{python}
summary_rows = []
for metric in LANGUAGE_METRICS:
    meta = LANGUAGE_METADATA[metric]
    count_col = meta.get("count_col")
    summary_rows.append(
        {
            "metric": metric,
            "label": _metric_short_label(metric),
            "tracts_with_data": int(tracts[metric].notna().sum()),
            "max_tract_share": tracts[metric].max(skipna=True),
            "total_count": tracts[count_col].sum(skipna=True) if count_col in tracts.columns else None,
        }
    )

summary = pd.DataFrame(summary_rows)
display(summary)

if DEMOGRAPHIC_LAYERS:
    demographic_summary = pd.DataFrame(
        [
            {
                "metric": metric,
                "label": _metric_short_label(metric),
                "tracts_with_data": int(tracts[metric].notna().sum()),
                "min": tracts[metric].min(skipna=True),
                "max": tracts[metric].max(skipna=True),
            }
            for metric in DEMOGRAPHIC_LAYERS
        ]
    )
    display(demographic_summary)
else:
    print("No demographic layers were added. Confirm that a baseline file exists and contains demographic columns.")
```

```{python}
expected_files = [
    MAP_OUTPUT_DIR / LANGUAGE_METADATA[metric].get("filename", f"{metric}.html")
    for metric in LANGUAGE_METRICS
] + [
    MAP_OUTPUT_DIR / "language_household_lep_layers.html",
]

for path in expected_files:
    assert path.exists(), path
    assert path.stat().st_size > 10_000, path

print(f"Wrote {len(expected_files)} language map files to {MAP_OUTPUT_DIR}")
print(f"Language bubble overlays: {len(LANGUAGE_METRICS)}")
print(f"Demographic custom side-panel options: {len(DEMOGRAPHIC_LAYERS)}")
```
